positive: A vibrant, symmetrical illustration of a mystical forest scene at dawn. The composition features silhouetted giant mushrooms, intertwined glowing roots, and stylized bioluminescent flora reaching toward a stylized, gentle sun. The color palette should be limited to deep sapphire blues, ethereal teal, vibrant emerald green, and accents of glowing gold, creating a strong, high-contrast look. The style should be highly detailed, graphic, and inspired by modern nature illustration and Japanese woodblock print aesthetics, suitable for a textile repeat pattern. Clean lines, strong silhouettes, and a centralized, balanced composition are essential. Ink wash quality, vector art finish, no photorealism.
negative: photorealistic, blur, fuzzy, grain, low resolution, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cluttered, messy, noise, disfigured, cartoonish, 3d render
